_comment: SYNTHETIC blueprint for the theory-eval harness. Matches the real blueprint.json shape that compare_graphs.py reads: domains -> components -> { class_name, type, api, dependencies } keyed by req_id, plus domains -> entities. The ONLY join compare_graphs needs is bp.domains[d].components[REQ_X].class_name -> 'XService'.

_design.REQ_X_TO_XSERVICE: Maps REQ_X -> class_name 'XService'. The target-graph fixture deliberately DOES contain an XService component, so the legacy class-existence check (compare_graphs line 66) PASSes -- which is exactly the hollow result T4 exposes when the class carries no implemented_rules.
_design.build_order: Single-element build order; present so a dependency-chain walk has a well-formed list to read.
